text: I find myself in a space dedicated to research and development—its clean lines and modern glass walls cultivate an atmosphere of curiosity and anticipation. The exhibit before me champions innovation and the human mind's capacity to explore and create. It fills me with a sense of purpose and a contemplative awe at the ceaseless journey of knowledge and invention. I feel inspired, yet humbled, by the reminders of how small I am within the vast, interconnected web of human progress.
